title: tagetes erecta
intro: Tagetes erecta, also known as the Mexican marigold, is an annual flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tagetes erecta include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting digestion, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
